items.content_text:

items.title: [MIXED] US-Iran tensions and a hawkish Fed outlook are likely to support the US Dolla…
items.content_text:
US-Iran tensions and a hawkish Fed outlook are likely to support the US Dollar, setting up EUR/USD to weaken at the open from Friday's close of 1.139; USD/JPY is likely to extend gains on geopolitical risk premium from Friday's close of 161.69.
